arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Gunners target hints at exit as new transfer chief identifies three signings
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal face a home game against Fulham to kick-start their Premier League season after the international break - and there's still plenty to play for as they look to keep their faint title hopes alive and progress in Europe

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal prefer Gyokeres over Isak
arts.sum: Sporting CP star Viktor Gyökeres is reportedly now favorite to fill Arsenal's vacant striker position. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'interested' in striker alternative to Alexander Isak previously linked to Manchester United
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly developing strong interest in a striker who Manchester United hold interest in, with Mikel Arteta searching for an Alexander Isak alternative.

arts.ttl: Fulham predicted XI vs. Arsenal: Possible starting lineup for as Marco Silva's side in Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Fulham could line up for Tuesday's Premier League clash against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted XI vs. Fulham: Possible starting lineup as Mikel Arteta's side return to Premier League action
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Arsenal could line up for Tuesday's Premier League clash against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale set for transfer reunion less than one year after £25m Arsenal move
arts.sum: The 26-year-old, who left Arsenal last summer to join Southampton for £25million, could be on the move once again with Saints on the verge of suffering a second relegation in three years. Ramsdale spent three years at Bournemouth after joining the club from Sheffield United in 2017.

arts.ttl: Arsenal step up Viktor Gyokeres chase with two preferred targets proving problematic
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to sign a new striker in the summer and Andrea Berta, who has replaced Edu as the Gunners' sporting director, is said to be a big fan of Viktor Gyokeres

arts.ttl: Preview: Arsenal vs. Fulham - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Fulham, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm Berta as sporting director - what will 'architect' bring?
arts.sum: Arsenal are turning to Andrea Berta, who previously worked at Atletico Madrid, to be their new sporting director, so what is on his to-do list?

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'developing strong interest' in Viktor Gyokeres with new sporting director Andrea Berta a 'firm admirer' of Sporting Lisbon striker
arts.sum: As reported by The Athletic, Andrea Berta, whose appointment as Arsenal's new sporting director was confirmed on Sunday, regards Gyokeres highly.
